MODULE Two – INTRODUCTION TO MODULE 2

Executive Summary:
Key Takeaways:
• 	In this module, we go deeper into sequencing and we start molding your launch
story (This is what sets you apart in the market.)
• 	In Module 2, we also cover the mental triggers. This is powerful stuff in every area of
your life, whether you’re trying to sell a product or in any interactions you have with
people.
• 	Then we go into story. Story is incredibly powerful. Story pulls people in. It’s how
you attract people and hold people. You could hold them for minutes to hours to
days to weeks to years if you can tell story within your marketing and use the
elements of story.
• 	Then after that we go into the Business Launch Formula. That’s about how you
take all this Product Launch Formula goodness and sequence it into a
much bigger business. It’s really about sequences within sequences.
• 	Remember, it’s about baby steps. Take one video at a time, one concept at a time,
one exercise at a time.
• 	Don’t be too hard on yourself – it’s not about making monumental change
overnight. It’s about making an incremental change that adds up to an exponential
change.
• 	Take part in the community – let them pull you up and pull you along. We’re
building that community for you.
• 	Stay the course – follow the formula and it will work. Don’t reinvent the wheel – this
stuff is proven and it works.
Conclusion
• 	It’s not necessary to have this all planned out ahead of time
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

• 	The key is to listen to the audience, build the list, build the relationship, and
let the market define what you should do next
• 	Strategically use your launches to build your list, relationships, product
portfolio, and positioning in the market
• 	Ultimately, your positioning builds more positioning, and this allows you to
go from launching a single product to building a valuable business
